title: implementation-rules manifest
description: Per-feature code-implementation manifest (specs/<feature>/implementation-rules.yml). Reference-by-ID selections from code-rules.yml + per-rule decisions + custom rules + dependency_policy (FR-013). Forward-compatible with Proposal 156 (stable rule ids as the join key) and Proposal 162 (context_scope). Draft authored at plan; refined at implement.

schema_version.description: Additive evolution marker; mismatch is fail-open WARN.

context_scope.description: V1 writes feature_standalone; product_baseline/feature_delta reserved for Proposal 162.

product_id.description: Forward-compat hook for Proposal 162; no behavior in V1.

resolved_stack.description: The stack resolved at the lens turn (drives the catalog slice).

id.description: References a code-rules.yml id (or a declared custom rule).

checked.description: false on a baseline rule = a recorded exception.

decision.description: The human's decision for a decision-prompt rule.

reviewer_preference.description: Human-selected or explicitly auto-selected continuous co-review preference captured by the code-implementation workshop. Model and effort are opaque because harness capabilities are provider-specific and volatile.

mode.description: human-selected means the workshop chose a reviewer; auto-select means Specrew should apply the ranking policy.

host.description: Requested reviewer harness/host, such as codex, claude, or copilot.

model.description: Requested reviewer model label/id as understood by the selected host.

effort.description: Optional host-specific reasoning/effort setting, stored opaquely for the reviewer adapter/future capability layer.

authorization_ref.description: Optional approval reference when the chosen reviewer requires explicit cost/privacy authorization.

rationale.description: Short reason for the choice or fallback.
